{{Infobox event
| name = Erinin social
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|An [[Erinin social]] involves people wearing elaborate dresses and flower-decorated suits.}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
